settings.name: Vivek
settings.title: Software Engineer
settings.summary: Experienced backend engineer focused on fast, reliable APIs and scalable web systems.

description: Improved GeoIP accuracy by upgrading the MaxMind library and automating DB updates via GitHub Actions; country accuracy 95% → 99%, city accuracy 61% → 97%.
Built Bank Account Verification APIs with polling, document upload fallback, and cancellation to reduce drop-offs in failure scenarios.
Migrated sanction screening from LexisNexis to Zigram across onboarding and re-KYC flows for higher compliance reliability.
Implemented immediate session invalidation for blocked users, closing a critical security gap.
Upgraded the Auth service runtime from Node.js 14 to 20, refactoring incompatible dependencies without regressions.
Resolved memory leaks and bottlenecks in auth flows, cutting P99 latency by ~50% under peak load.
Refined backend APIs and user workflows for an edtech platform; fixed 15+ bugs and added booking, edit, and cancellation features for 600+ users.
Improved mentor dashboards, session tracking, and community pages, boosting retention by 20%.
Built a 3D immersive environment with Babylon.js, Blender, and Mixamo for real-time avatar movement and customization.
Developed auth flow and REST APIs for a social app in Node.js and TypeScript, serving 100+ daily active users.
Shipped image/video posts, stories, likes, and event management for real estate agents.
Built an admin dashboard in React + TypeScript for managing thousands of users.
Optimized MongoDB queries for high-volume content.
